texto: I seem to get into situations that make people laugh, but I don't consider myself that funny of a person. I'm not witty. I'm kind of slow in conversations. I'm not that articulate with jokes. The first time I made stuff and screened it for an audience, I was surprised what people were laughing at.
explicacao: Citação de Nathan Fielder sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I seem to get into situations that make people laugh, but I don't consider myself that funny of a…” articula humor, time, myself em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como myself e laugh.

frase_original: I seem to get into situations that make people laugh, but I don't consider myself that funny of a person. I'm not witty. I'm kind of slow in conversations. I'm not that articulate with jokes. The first time I made stuff and screened it for an audience, I was surprised what people were laughing at.
